name: multi-agent weather comparison via fork with anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6

arguments.name: weather-berlin
arguments.prompt: Search for the current weather in Berlin, Germany and report the temperature in Celsius.

arguments.name: weather-london
arguments.prompt: Search for the current weather in London, UK and report the temperature in Celsius.

arguments.name: weather-paris
arguments.prompt: Search for the current weather in Paris, France and report the temperature in Celsius.

responses.content:
I have spawned three sub-agents to check the weather. Based on current conditions:

| City | Temperature |
|------|-------------|
| Berlin | 5°C |
| London | 8°C |
| Paris | 12°C |

Berlin is the coldest at 5°C.
The current weather in Berlin is 5 degrees Celsius.
The current weather in London is 8 degrees Celsius.
The current weather in Paris is 12 degrees Celsius.

steps.send_keys: Use multiple sub-agents to determine the weather in Berlin, London and Paris then tell me which is the coldest.\r
